claim_bullets.bullet_text: This sample edition includes just a portion of the complete book, (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.16-17)
Buying the book in progress entitles you to free updates, (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.16-17)
There's really no risk at all if you read the book and it doesn't blow your mind, (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.16-17)

source_record_text: This section describes the sample PDF edition of JavaScript Allongé, including details about the book's release, updates, and refund policy.
